message:
feat(storage,indexer): harden FTS schema lifecycle and migrate to ephemeral writer connections

The FTS (full-text search) subsystem suffered from two classes of failures
that could leave the search index in an unrecoverable state:

1. Duplicate fts_messages rows in sqlite_master (from interrupted migrations
   or concurrent schema operations) made DROP TABLE fail silently, leaving
   artifact rows that caused subsequent CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE to error.
   Fix: add scrub_fts_schema_via_writable_schema() which uses PRAGMA
   writable_schema to forcibly remove all fts_messages artifacts when normal
   DROP TABLE fails or leaves residue. FrankenStorage::open now detects and
   repairs duplicate schema rows on startup.

2. Long-lived storage connections used for index writes accumulated retained
   MVCC state on older frankensqlite builds that ignore autocommit_retain,
   causing stale reads. Fix: all indexer write operations (set_last_scan_ts,
   set_last_embedded_message_id, set_last_indexed_at) now use short-lived
   writer connections via persist::with_ephemeral_writer, ensuring each
   write gets a fresh connection that does not retain old snapshots.

Additional improvements:
- Extract open_rusqlite_with_busy_timeout() helper to deduplicate connection
  setup across FTS rebuild, materialization, and consistency check paths
- Remove #[cfg(test)] gates from rusqlite_fts_schema_rows,
  rusqlite_fts_limit_probe, ensure_fts_consistency_via_rusqlite, and
  FtsConsistencyRepair so they can be used in production FTS repair paths
- Add finalize_seeded_canonical_bundle FTS consistency check after seeding
- Refactor sync_sources_config_to_db to collect Source records before
  persisting, reducing lock contention
- Fix cost calculation to exclude cache tokens from input pricing to avoid
  double-charging at both full input rate and cache-specific rates
- Add parallel_insert_conversation_tree_keeps_unique_external_ids_distinct
  test verifying concurrent writers produce distinct conversation rows
- Add persist_conversations_batched_registers_missing_remote_source tests
  for both serial and begin-concurrent paths
- Harden ensure_fts_schema test helper to verify stock SQLite queryability
- Fix reset_storage test to reopen storage after reset for accurate counts
- Add schema column existence tests using PRAGMA table_info iteration
- Add ingest_batch checkpoint policy test serialization annotation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
